functions.name: MODEL
functions.description: Get financials, key metrics, dividends or estimates. =MODEL("AAPL","Revenue","LY")

parameters.name: param
parameters.description: Revenue | EPS | ROE | PE Ratio | Market Cap | Dividend | Target Price | Sector ...

parameters.name: period
parameters.description: TTM | LY | LY-1 | LY-2 | LQ | LQ-1 | 2024 ...

parameters.name: quarter
parameters.description: Q1 Q2 Q3 Q4 (quarterly data only)

functions.name: MODELPRICE
functions.description: Live or historical prices for stocks, crypto (BTCUSD), forex (EURUSD), commodities (GC=F), indices (^GSPC).

parameters.name: param
parameters.description: Price | Open | High | Low | Close | Volume | Dividend | 52 Week High | Market Cap ...

functions.name: MODELFUNDS
functions.description: ETF/Fund data: NAV, Expense Ratio, AUM, Yield, YTD Return, Category ...

parameters.name: ticker
parameters.description: ETF symbol e.g. SPY, QQQ, VTI

parameters.name: param
parameters.description: NAV | Expense Ratio | AUM | Yield | YTD Return | 3 Year Return | Category | Fund Family

functions.name: MODELOPTIONS
functions.description: Options chain data — real-time or historical.

parameters.name: param
parameters.description: Strike | Bid | Ask | IV | Volume | Open Interest | In The Money | Change
